id: sync-navidrome
title: "Sync Navidrome library"

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/preferences/navidrome/sync"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Triggers an incremental sync of the Navidrome music library. Returns an HTML fragment with sync status.

  parameters={undefined}
